summary: Iteration 42: Table Management Enhancements - All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: KDS page shows prominent orange TABLE banner with Armchair icon for dine-in orders, Order Status page shows table number badges, 20 tables across 5 sections working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/tables/sections returns 5 sections (Main Hall, Outdoor, VIP Room, Balcony, Private Dining)
Backend: GET /api/tables returns 20 tables (T1-T8, V1-V3, O1-O4, B1-B3, P1-P2)
Backend: Tables have correct section assignments (verified mapping)
Backend: GET /api/tables/stats shows total_tables=20 and total_capacity=89
Backend: GET /api/order-status/active is public (no auth needed) and returns table_number and table_id
Backend: POST /api/tables/{id}/start-order creates order with table_number field set
Backend: Order status endpoint includes table_number and table_id for dine-in orders
Backend: POST /api/cashier/login with PIN 1234 works for waiter authentication
Frontend: /table-management shows 20 tables with 5 section tabs
Frontend: Section filtering works - clicking Outdoor shows only O1-O4 (4 tables)
Frontend: /waiter page - login with PIN 1234 shows all 20 tables with section tabs
Frontend: /waiter page - select table, add items, send to kitchen works
Frontend: /kds page - shows prominent orange TABLE banner with Armchair icon for dine-in orders
Frontend: /kds page - data-testid='kds-table-badge-*' present for testing
Frontend: /order-status page - shows table number badges with Armchair icon for dine-in orders
critical_code_review_comments: KitchenDisplayPage.jsx (line 323-331): Orange TABLE banner implemented with bg-orange-500, Armchair icon, and 'Dine In' badge for dine-in orders
OrderStatusPage.jsx (lines 111-114, 167-170): Table number badges with Armchair icon showing for orders with table_number
cashier_pos.py (lines 175-185): GET /order-status/active projection includes table_number and table_id fields
tables.py (lines 363-379): start-order creates orders with table_number, table_id, and order_type='dine_in'
seed_data_creation: 20 tables across 5 sections: Main Hall (T1-T8, 4 seats each), VIP Room (V1-V3, 6 seats each), Outdoor (O1-O4, 3-4 seats each), Balcony (B1-B3, 2 seats each), Private Dining (P1-P2, 10-12 seats each). Total capacity: 89 seats.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 tested the 3 Table Management enhancements: (1) KDS page now shows prominent orange TABLE banner with Armchair icon for dine-in orders (data-testid='kds-table-badge-*'), (2) Order Status page shows table number badges with Armchair icon, (3) 20 tables now exist across 5 sections - Main Hall (T1-T8), VIP Room (V1-V3), Outdoor (O1-O4), Balcony (B1-B3), Private Dining (P1-P2). The GET /api/order-status/active public endpoint now returns table_number and table_id fields. Orders created via /tables/{id}/start-order automatically have order_type='dine_in' and table_number set. Kitchen display and Order Status pages both properly show table information for dine-in orders. Total table capacity is 89 seats.
